common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to get the logistics tracking information of a booking.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

children.description:
The Shopee logistics status for the booking. Applicable values.

LOGISTICS_REQUEST_CREATED:booking arranged shipment

LOGISTICS_PICKUP_DONE:booking handed over to 3PL

LOGISTICS_PICKUP_FAILED:booking cancelled by 3PL due to failed pickup or picked up but not able to proceed with delivery

LOGISTICS_DELIVERY_DONE:successfully delivered

LOGISTICS_REQUEST_CANCELED:cancelled when booking at LOGISTICS_REQUEST_CREATED

LOGISTICS_READY:booking ready for fulfilment

LOGISTICS_INVALID:cancelled when booking at LOGISTICS_READY

LOGISTICS_LOST:booking cancelled due to 3PL lost the parcel
children.name: logistics_status

children.description: The time when logistics info has been updated.
children.name: update_time

children.description: The description of booking logistics tracking info.logistics_status
children.name: description
children.sample: Your parcel is ready to ship from the seller

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.uat.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/get_booking_tracking_info?access_token=access_token&booking_sn=201201E81SYYKE&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

tracking_info.description: Your parcel is ready to ship from the seller
